business.type_label: pet sitting & dog walking service company

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is entrusting their pet/home to a firm; the page sells defined expertise via credentials (16+ yrs, awards), testimonials (124 Google reviews) and a clear process. First rung of ladder (sells defined expertise) fires.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to request a quote / contact / start a booking for pet care

structure.archetype_note: Marketing/lead-gen shell (home + service + pricing + contact + book) fronting a separate login-gated booking portal; ~20 pages visible in nav incl. Areas We Cover, Academy, Blog.

mapped.observed_as: Professional Pet Sitting & Dog Walking Services...
WHY CHOOSE US TO WALK YOUR DOG?
WHEN YOU DECIDE TO BOOK A DOG WALK WITH US (4 steps)
Frequently Asked Questions about hiring a dog walker
Ready to Hire A Dog Walker? / Ready to book a local dog walker?
Pet Sitting Prices / Cat Sitting Prices / Dog Walking Prices
Why Price Isn't the Only Thing That Matters / Why Our Pricing Reflects Quality Care
How to Get an Exact Quote / GET IN TOUCH (contact form)
Join Our Pet Lovers Community (email signup)

unmapped.observed: Book Online page (Instructions to Register / Instructions to Book Now - My Info/My Pets/My Schedule)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Describes a login-gated booking portal handoff; no canonical section models an off-site booking-engine instruction/registration page
Hours block on a service page; canonical set has no hours/contact-details section (map-hours is a capability, not a section)

proposed_new.name: booking-portal
proposed_new.evidence: Book Online page instructs visitors to register and submit My Info/My Pets/My Schedule to a login-gated scheduling portal for office approval - a stateful booking engine beyond form/redirect capability vocab

confidence.why: Full 5-page capture, but the actual conversion (booking) lives in a login-gated portal not visible in the static crawl, so the true primary mechanism is inferred; also verbatim pricing inconsistency (9 vs 19 euro/walk) and unknown contact-form submit text add ambiguity.

gap_findings: Site runs MULTIPLE parallel conversion actions (quote/contact form, tel call, login-gated booking portal, ebook lead-magnet download via ConvertKit, newsletter signup) - the taxonomy assumes ONE conversion action; no clean single-goal fit.

Login-gated booking portal (register -> My Info/My Pets/My Schedule -> submit for office approval) is a stateful booking engine that neither 'form' nor 'redirect' mechanism, nor any capability in the closed vocab, expresses.

Awards-as-proof and media 'As Featured In' logo walls both map to socialProof/certs but the four-award streak (Business of the Year x multiple years) is a distinct authority signal worth a dedicated proof treatment.
No canonical section for an office-hours / contact-details block that appears on service pages.
